# Node.js CI/CD Pipeline Demo

## What this project does
Automatically tests, builds, and deploys a Node.js app 
using GitHub Actions and Docker whenever code is pushed to main.

## Pipeline Flow
push to main → run tests → build Docker image → push to DockerHub

## Tech Stack
- Node.js + Express
- Docker
- GitHub Actions
- DockerHub

## How to run locally
npm install
npm start
# Visit http://localhost:3000
